thoughts.en: So far this is an easy read with high level intro into AI topics. Some of the topics covered by the book: Planning AI application, Training data, Model architecture, Transformer architecture, Models size, calculating training price, post-training, sampling, Structured Outputs, finetuning, evaluation, Language Modeling Metrics, exact vs. subjective evaluation, using AI as a judge, comparative evaluation, Choosing evaluation criteria, Model selection workflow, designing evaluation pipeline, Prompt engineering, Prompt engineering best practices, Defenses against prompt attacks,
thoughts.uk: Читається легко. Вступ до тем штучного інтелекту. Деякі з тем, які розглядаються в книзі: Planning AI application, Training data, Model architecture, Transformer architecture, Models size, calculating training price, post-training, sampling, Structured Outputs, finetuning, evaluation, Language Modeling Metrics, exact vs. subjective evaluation, using AI as a judge, comparative evaluation, Choosing evaluation criteria, Model selection workflow, designing evaluation pipeline, Prompt engineering, Prompt engineering best practices, Defenses against prompt attacks,
